reviews.author: My Nguyen
reviews.text: Great view of Con Dao for sunset watching! Breathtaking view, highly recommended spot

reviews.author: M Darling
reviews.text: It was too windy to truly enjoy but one of the most out of this world beaches we have ever seen

reviews.author: ad bf
reviews.text: Visited in march, perfect conditions to enjoy this beach - warm, sunny weather with almost no wind, and cool, comfortable, calm, amazingly clear water. the beach is set in a truly stunning location and the sunset here is really something special. Two caveats: there is a landfill close to the beach. others have said they did not smell anything. on a couple of occasions during 2 hours at this beach, unfortunately, i did notice the smell. never for very long, but it did occur. maybe something to note if you have a sensitive nose. secondly - it is a well-known sunset spot, so plenty of people gather here starting from 5pm to take photos. come before then, though, and you’ll likely have this beautiful beach to yourself. enjoy your swim earlier in the day, then if you drive up to shark cape, you can enjoy the sunset from a higher vantage point without so many people around.

reviews.author: Milán Bakó
reviews.text: Nice sunset point, nice twilight. You can also buy delicious coconut from a guy with motorbike.

reviews.author: Minh Nhựt
reviews.text: Super smooth sand and crystal clear water! My favorite spots for a swim so far.

reviews.author: Anh Pham
reviews.text: This place is surreal. Where mountains meet the ocean. Everything looks like a painting

reviews.author: Влада Мамонтова
reviews.text: The best beach in Con Dao in my opinion. If you go a bit further to the west, there will be absolutely nobody at the beach, perfect sand and very clear water. Highly recommend

reviews.author: Nam Nguyen
reviews.text: Get a bike and go for a drive along here around 5pm, then you get the perfect view + air + Con Dao signature chill island

reviews.author: Eva Meglič
reviews.text: This was my favourite place on the island and actually in the whole Vietnam. The views here are so amazing and the sea is so pretty. The different blue colors are so wonderful. I would highly recommend visiting and swimming here. There are still some trash around, but much less than on any other beach on the island.

reviews.author: Sandy Phạm
reviews.text: View to the sea and feel the cool breeze. The location of the beach absolutely perfect. As soon as we take off our bike, we just need to cross the road and there is a direct path leading to the beach. It felt like a private shore, clear water, a very good place to relax and chill. The scenery was beautiful and it was a relieve to walk in such a quiet and peaceful environment. The view of the sunset from that point was mesmerizing. I must say one of the best view in Con Dao.

reviews.author: Vũ Thị Kim Chi
reviews.text: The most beautiful beach I have ever seen in Vietnam. Few people bath here so the sand is smooth and there are no footprints. Well worth coming and experiencing

reviews.author: nga luong
reviews.text: The best beach ever in Vietnam 💓 During the non-windy season (from March to ~ October): a spectacular scene, sun shining all-day long reflected on the calm blue sea, lying on the white sand, hearing the rhythm of the sea. And at the end of the day, you got burned too much :))))

reviews.author: Anastasia Ustyugova
reviews.text: Beautiful beach and a point for sunset.

reviews.author: MLSL Leuwol
reviews.text: Awesome to see the sunset from here. Make sure you're on time and find a nice spot to sit and watch the sun go down. We were here around 17.20 PM.

reviews.author: Alex Chef
reviews.text: Beautiful beach! No matter if it's rainy, cloudy, or sunny, it's always stunning!

reviews.author: Daniel Chruszcz
reviews.text: Very good spot for sunset landscape photos.

reviews.author: Toni
reviews.text: Best Beach on the island. Fine and white sand. Crystal clear water. There is a landfill opposite, but it doesn’t stink

reviews.author: Hậu Huỳnh
reviews.text: Incredible! My favourite beach in Con Dao. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Minh Nguyen
reviews.text: Most beautiful coast in Con Dao Island

reviews.author: An N
reviews.text: Serenity, quite and charming place

reviews.author: Nguyễn Quang Huy
reviews.text: A beautiful nature beach in Vietnam.

reviews.author: Tuan Dang
reviews.text: The most beautiful beach in the island

reviews.author: Dmitry Pshenichnikov
reviews.text: The best cuisine on the island! The soups are fantastic. Don't be late, everything is busy.

reviews.author: M E
reviews.text: You get a nice view at sunset. There is trash everywhere on the beach.

reviews.author: VISIT MY AMAZING VIETNAM
reviews.text: Very beautiful beach Bai Nhat, water is transparent and blue.
